description: Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom is a trippy arcade platformer ready to take you on a crazy adventure!

YTGV.v0.3.0.description:
# Outdated - You probably want the [latest version](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/releases/latest)

[Mod](https://github.com/soopercool101/YellowTaxiAP/releases/tag/v0.3.0) | [Setup Guide](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/blob/YTGV.v0.3.0/worlds/yellowtaxi/docs/setup_en.md)

## v0.3.0 - Fancy Plumber Update

- Add Flushed Away
  - Similarly to Gym Gears and Fecal Matters, can be set to be handled in a variety of different ways, including adding a new `Sewer Key` item for it
- Add Hatsanity
  - Supports two different modes, Hatsanity or Shopsanity, allowing hat shop locations to be handled as the same location or different ones on a per-hat basis
  - Also supports shuffling extra hats into the pool, up to all the hats in the game if the filler pool allows for it.
  - New "Funny Faces" option allows a texture of choice to appear on the TV Hat, and/or on coin checks
- Add Time Trials settings
  - Time Trials can be locked behind an item, and can have their Gears shuffled (this will add regular gears to the pool!)
- Supports new "Expert 3" setting
- Supports Universal Tracker "Glitched Logic", displaying checks 1 expert level above your own
- Various logic tweaks and improvements
YTGV.v0.3.0.title: Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom APWorld v0.3.0

## v0.3.1

- Fix bug in which Locked Time Trial setting would not be added to slot data, resulting in the client always assuming Time Trials were locked

## v0.3.0 - Fancy Plumber Update

- Add Flushed Away
  - Similarly to Gym Gears and Fecal Matters, can be set to be handled in a variety of different ways, including adding a new `Sewer Key` item for it
- Add Hatsanity
  - Supports two different modes, Hatsanity or Shopsanity, allowing hat shop locations to be handled as the same location or different ones on a per-hat basis
  - Also supports shuffling extra hats into the pool, up to all the hats in the game if the filler pool allows for it.
  - New "Funny Faces" option allows a texture of choice to appear on the TV Hat, and/or on coin checks
- Add Time Trials settings
  - Time Trials can be locked behind an item, and can have their Gears shuffled (this will add regular gears to the pool!)
- Supports new "Expert 3" setting
- Supports Universal Tracker "Glitched Logic", displaying checks 1 expert level above your own
- Various logic tweaks and improvements
YTGV.v0.3.1.title: Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom APWorld v0.3.1

YTGV.v0.3.2.description:

## v0.3.2

- Migrate rule system to Rule Builder
  - Archipelago v0.6.7 or above is now required on this and all future versions
- Fix fuzzer errors

## v0.3.1

- Fix bug in which Locked Time Trial setting would not be added to slot data, resulting in the client always assuming Time Trials were locked

## v0.3.0 - Fancy Plumber Update

- Add Flushed Away
  - Similarly to Gym Gears and Fecal Matters, can be set to be handled in a variety of different ways, including adding a new `Sewer Key` item for it
- Add Hatsanity
  - Supports two different modes, Hatsanity or Shopsanity, allowing hat shop locations to be handled as the same location or different ones on a per-hat basis
  - Also supports shuffling extra hats into the pool, up to all the hats in the game if the filler pool allows for it.
  - New "Funny Faces" option allows a texture of choice to appear on the TV Hat, and/or on coin checks
- Add Time Trials settings
  - Time Trials can be locked behind an item, and can have their Gears shuffled (this will add regular gears to the pool!)
- Supports new "Expert 3" setting
- Supports Universal Tracker "Glitched Logic", displaying checks 1 expert level above your own
- Various logic tweaks and improvements

## Initial Release
- Contains the following levels:
  - Hub (Morio's Lab/Granny's Island)
  - Morio's Home
  - Bombeach
  - Gym Gears
  - Fecal Matters
  - Mosk's Rocket

v0.1.3.description:
# Outdated - You probably want the [latest version](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/releases/latest)

[Mod](https://github.com/soopercool101/YellowTaxiAP/releases/tag/v0.1.0) | [Setup Guide](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/blob/v0.1.3/worlds/yellowtaxi/docs/setup_en.md)

## v0.1.3
- Add Coinsanity Percentage setting, which allows for a percentage of coins to become checks, rather than all or nothing
  - Capped by two new host.yaml settings, one controlling the max percentage of coins that can be checks (default 100%), and one controlling the max percentage of coins that can be non-filler (default 5%).
    - The old host.yaml setting has been deprecated and will no longer be used

## v0.1.2
- Fix expert logic issue where it would be expected to talk to Morio in the Dream Machine before Full Game Unlock is received

## v0.1.1
- Logic fixes
  - Fix Crash Again not properly expecting Full Game Unlock
  - Fix Shortcut Pipe to Observatory Room being considered in non-expert logic
  - Add alternate path to upper floors for non-expert logic

## Initial Release
- Contains the following levels:
  - Hub (Morio's Lab/Granny's Island)
  - Morio's Home
  - Bombeach
  - Gym Gears
  - Fecal Matters
  - Mosk's Rocket
v0.1.3.title: Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom APWorld ALPHA v0.1.3

v0.2.0.description:
# Outdated - You probably want the [latest version](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/releases/latest)

[Mod](https://github.com/soopercool101/YellowTaxiAP/releases/tag/v0.2.0) | [Setup Guide](https://github.com/soopercool101/Archipelago/blob/32541989a29cbcca99b07719dbd63849b0ef55f7/worlds/yellowtaxi/docs/setup_en.md)

## v0.2.0 - World State Update
- Add `Open Granny's Island` setting, allowing Granny's Island to be more accessible moveless
- Add `Locked Morio's Lab` setting, allowing Morio's Lab to get locked behind a new key item
  - If `Open Granny's Island` is off, turning this on will start you inside the lab, to prevent an empty first sphere.
- Add `Gym Gears Unlock Condition` setting, allowing you to choose how Gym Gears is unlocked
- Add `Fecal Matters Unlock Condition` setting, allowing you to choose how Fecal Matters is unlocked
  - Old `Shuffle Doggo` setting has been removed in favor of this
- Add location groups for each level
- Various logic tweaks, updates, and fixes
v0.2.0.title: Yellow Taxi Goes Vroom APWorld ALPHA v0.2.0
